---
title: "Jaylah Moering"
subtitle: "Data Science Student"

# Replace with your actual image file name
image: mypic.jpg

about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JaylahMoering
---

A little bit about my life.

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Education

## Experience
